repos.readme_excerpt: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs AI coding tools (Amp or Claude Code) repeatedly until all PRD items are complete. Each iteration is a fresh instance with clean context. Memory persists via git history, progress.txt, and prd.json. Based on Geoffrey Huntley's Ralph pattern. Read my...
